scripts.build: expo export -p web && sed -i 's|</head>|<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="512x512" href="/ImagesManager_Mobile/icon-512.png"><link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="192x192" href="/ImagesManager_Mobile/icon-192.png"><link rel="manifest" href="/ImagesManager_Mobile/manifest.json"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes"><meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Images Manager"></head>|' dist/index.html && cp web/manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m "Deploy" && git push
